title: Yolk Revive Roasted Egg Miso Soup
description: A low-fat-friendly Japanese dish featuring bitter and velvety roasted egg yolks in a miso broth to aid hangover recovery.
instructions: Crack the egg yolks into a mixing bowl. Add miso paste, vegetable oil, soy sauce, and crushed garlic.
Mix all ingredients well until you achieve a creamy consistency.
Transfer the mixture evenly onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Roast in preheated oven for 20 minutes or until golden brown on top and fragrant.
While waiting, heat water to boiling in a saucepan. Once boiling, add miso mixture and stir until dissolved.
Adjust seasoning if needed and serve hot with additional soy sauce for dipping.
